rulings.Case Title: BRETT PENFIL VS. SUSAN BADGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Susan Badger'S Notice Motion And Motion To Modify Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT SUSAN BADGER'S Motion To Modify Subpoena For Production Of Business Records DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion is granted as follows: Third-party witness, Mark Bran Architectural, may redact any financial information or social security number form its production. Any privileged documents must be identified in a privilege log, specifying the date(s) of communication or transmission of the document, the author and recipients of the document, the subject matter of the document, and the basis for claim of privilege. Motion is otherwise denied. Documents to be produced within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CARLTON FRANKLIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2018 line 7. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT sustained. No opposition filed. Demurrer to affirmative defense 3j(1) is sustained without leave to amend. Demurrer to other affirmative defenses is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts to state an affirmative defense. Defendant shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended answer. = (501/REQ)
